parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT || 'Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct' }}",
  "temperature": 0.3,
  "max_tokens": 256,
  "response_format": { "type": "json_object" },
  "messages": [
    { "role": "system", "content": "You are a search query formatter. Output ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown or explanation." },
    { "role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify('User intent: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.type || 'any') + '
Context: ' + JSON.stringify($json.context) + '

Return JSON: {"query":"search_string","radius":number_in_meters}

Rules:
- Build a search query string describing the type of place the user wants
- coffee intent => query="cafe bakery"
- food => query="restaurant cafe"
- outdoor => query="park outdoor"
- bar => query="bar pub"
- shopping => query="shopping mall"
- fitness => query="gym fitness"
- any => pick based on interests, bio, timeOfDay
- radius: 1500 (urban default)
- morning/afternoon: favor cafe, park, restaurant
- evening/night: favor bar, restaurant, pub') }} }
  ]
}
